name: memorable
description: Memorable v2 — self-adapting memory for LiveKit voice agents

scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm install:web && pnpm install:python && pnpm env:copy
scripts.env:copy: test -f apps/web/.env.local || cp apps/web/.env.example apps/web/.env.local 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test: uv run --directory packages/memorable pytest 2>/dev/null || echo 'no tests yet'
